message:
fix(config): handle YAML files with only comments correctly

When a config.yaml file contains only comments (like the default
created by init), serde_yaml parses it as Null rather than an error.
Previously, this caused config set to write "null" to the file,
breaking subsequent config get operations.

Also fixes 3 failing E2E tests in e2e_workspace_commands.rs:
- e2e_info_json_output: check for database_path field (br uses this)
- e2e_init_already_initialized: accept ALREADY_INITIALIZED error code
- e2e_config_get_set: use unique test key to avoid DB default conflicts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
